text: I took the subway and got off near the museum.
Now I am hungry and I want to find a good restaurant.

Table for two
Appetizer

Well-done

I would like the chicken, please.
Could I have the check, please?
Can you recommend a good dish?
I would like my steak well-done.
Good evening! Do you have a reservation?
Yes, a table for two. Can you recommend a good dish?
For the main course, I recommend the spicy fish. It is very popular.
The fish is too spicy for me. I would like the chicken, please. And a soup for an appetizer.
Perfect. And for the other person?
A steak, well-done, please. And later, could I have the check?
We have a reservation for a table for two.
My steak, well-done, please.

Good evening, and welcome to our restaurant. Thank you for your reservation. Tonight we have a few specials for you. As an appetizer, we have a fresh tomato soup. For the main course, the chef recommends the chicken with rice, or a spicy fish from the coast. If you like meat, our steak is very popular; you can have it well-done or medium. For dessert, we have a chocolate cake. And do not worry about the check; you can pay at the table when you finish. If you need anything, just call the waiter. Enjoy your evening, and have a wonderful meal.

Tonight I went to a restaurant in Paris with my family, and I ordered everything in English. First, I told the host we had a reservation for a table for two. The waiter was very kind. I asked him, can you recommend something? He recommended the spicy fish, but I am not good with spicy food, so I said, I would like the chicken, please. For my mom, I ordered a steak, well-done. As an appetizer, we had soup, and for dessert, a chocolate cake. At the end, I asked, could I have the check, please? I even left a small tip for the waiter. I was a little nervous, but I ordered our whole dinner in English, and I felt so proud.

First, you tell the host you have a reservation. Next, the waiter brings the menu and you ask, can you recommend something? After that, you order your appetizer and your main course. Then, you eat your meal and you order a dessert. Finally, you ask for the check and you leave a small tip.
